creator: dr@domix.de
text:
/usr/ports/irc/tirc/files/md5:
	MD5 (tirc-1.2.tar.gz) = d5e77df1f4e16c67cee602bc65dea6c6

	is invalid since there were some changes in the sources, and the new checksum of
	<ftp://ftp.mayn.de/pub/unix/software/Network/Irc/tirc/tirc-1.2.tar.gz> is

	MD5 (tirc-1.2.tar.gz) = 0f4b3e6e67830c3a0682c1d17893b5d2

Fix: here's a patch:

the complete shar:
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/irc/tirc ; make # only if $MASTER_SITE_OVERRIDE isn't set
